metadata.description: Clojure AI context plugins for GitHub Copilot — agents, skills, and workflows for REPL-first interactive programming with Calva Backseat Driver.

plugins.name: clojure
plugins.description: REPL-first Clojure development — agent and skill for any dialect and runtime.

plugins.name: clojure-editor
plugins.description: Subagent for editing Clojure files using Backseat Driver structural editing tools.

plugins.name: babashka
plugins.description: Babashka scripting and bb.edn task skills for idiomatic Babashka development.

plugins.name: joyride
plugins.description: Joyride skills for VS Code automation with ClojureScript — scripting, user scripts, and workspace automation.

plugins.name: epupp
plugins.description: Browser tampering and userscript development with Epupp (ClojureScript/Scittle in the browser).
